rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.2115, which governs school district contracting for respiratory distress medication and training.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or governing body of an open-enrollment charter school or private school may contract with a vendor to provide:
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject matter.
